song.title: Once It Was the Blessing
song.author: A.B. Simpson
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 C V5 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] .C G Am F Once it was the blessing, .C G C G Now it is the Lord; .C G Am F Once it was the feeling, .C G C Now it is His Word; .F C G C Once His gift I wanted, .F C G Now the Giver own; .C G Am F Once I sought for healing, .C G C Now Himself alone.
[C] .F C G C All in all forever, .F C G Only Christ I’ll sing; .C G Am F Everything is in Christ, . C G C And Christ is everything.
[V2] Once ’twas painful trying, Now ’tis perfect trust; Once a half salvation, Now the uttermost; Once ’twas ceaseless holding, Now He holds me fast; Once ’twas constant drifting, Now my anchor’s cast. .. .. .. .. --- [V3] Once ’twas busy planning, Now ’tis trustful prayer; Once ’twas anxious caring, Now He has the care; Once ’twas what I wanted, Now what Jesus says; Once ’twas constant asking, Now ’tis ceaseless praise.
[V4] Once it was my working, His it hence shall be; Once I tried to use Him, Now He uses me; Once the pow’r I wanted, Now the Mighty One; Once for self I labored, Now for Him alone.
[V5] Once I hoped in Jesus, Now I know He’s mine; Once my lamps were dying, Now they brightly shine; Once for death I waited, Now His coming hail; And my hopes are anchored Safe within the veil.
